race.comment: Siding with SOMERSAULT (6) for the Begg yard who resumed with a smart maiden victory at Geelong on wet ground, coming away to score by 0.8 lengths in good time. She'd promised a bit last time in and looks set to go on with it this time around from an ideal draw. TOMMYESS (7) has just found one better in his past couple of starts, beaten a long neck over this route last time out in an encouraging effort. He can go one better with that experience. ELECTRIC ELVIS (2) ran well fresh at Seymour behind a handy one in his first go for the new yard. He can strip fitter and take catching. DEEPSEEK (1) has a nice profile off a win at Mornington, kept fresh for this and can give a sight off the let up.
